name_en: Genuine quality, original factory leather version 🍒🍒5BB117
name_cn:
Genuine quality, original factory leather version 🍒🍒5BB117
MiuMiu new arrival tote, featuring this year's trendy velvet leather, a viral sensation, canvas lining. This bag is cool, capturing a refined multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Extra-large capacity yet lightweight. Simple yet not simplistic. Almost every fashion blogger has one. Size: 34X23X12cm 70500
